title: 8 PAW Patrol 23 CM Plates, Disposable Children's Birthday Party Plates, Themed Party Decoration Items
features: Large cardboard plates with Paw Patrol motif - official design with children's favourite heroes
23 cm diameter - Ideal for larger portions such as pieces of cake, pizza or sandwiches.
Perfect for children's birthdays - Complements any Paw Patrol birthday decoration and themed party
Practical and hygienic - disposable plates for quick and easy party cleaning
MATCHING COMBINABLE - Complemented by cups, napkins and more in the same style
description: Product Description WELCOME TO BEENSMILE Discover all the products you need for party decorations and birthday parties at BeenSmile with the most popular licenses. We have the funniest party items for any children's or adult birthday party, from pinatas, balloons and pennants to tableware such as cups, plates and tablecloths to make your party special. Most popular licenses Barbie Immerse yourself in the world of Barbie where fun and style combine to create an unforgettable experience, along with your childhood memories of moments together. sonic Prepare for a party full of fun and adventure and battle Shadows plans alongside Sonic. Peppa Pig The fully decorated party to celebrate the birthday together with Peppa Pig, her friends and family. Paw Patrol The fully decorated party to celebrate the birthday together with Peppa Pig, her friends and family. Don't forget details for the perfect themed party At BeenSmile we have a wide range of party supplies to help you create a themed birthday or theme party with Peppa Pig, Paw Patrol, Sonic, SpongeBob Squarepants, Heidi, LadyBug, Skye, Transformers and many more! Skye, Transformers and many more! Prepare the perfect table for little ones with Zenon's Farm We have everything you need to decorate your little one's birthday party with their favorite Zenon's Farm cartoons, from plates and glasses to tablecloths, napkins, banners and pinatas! Doraemon Celebrate with the magic of Doraemon! Decorate your birthday party with our Doraemon Decor Set: Banners, pinatas and themed accessories - ideal for fans of the cosmic cat! Make your party a space adventure! Paw Patrol Get ready for an action-packed, adventurous party inspired by the exploits of Paw Patrol! farm Welcome to Zenos Farm! Decorate your birthday party with plates and banners from Bartolito, Zenon and his friends. Perfect for little ones who love animals and country life - rural fun for the little ones! Power Ranger Transform your party with Power Rangers! Our decorations include pinatas, tablecloths and much more with the motifs of your favourite heroes. Perfect for an action-packed, adventurous birthday party - unleash your powers and defend the fun! Peppa Pig Peppa Pig is fun! Decorate your birthday party with cups, pinatas, plates and decorations in the style of Peppa, George and his friends. Perfect for children's parties full of colour and fun, Oink oink, let the celebration begin! Pj Mask PJ Masks Party Night! Add a heroic touch to your celebration with the Catboy, Owlette and Gekko decorations. Perfect for a birthday full of adventure, pinatas and more - it's time to be heroes at your own party! garfield Get ready for a party full of action and adventure inspired by the heroics of Garfield! Teenage Mutant Hero Turtles Cowabunga! Give your party a radical spin with the Ninja Turtles. Deco set with pinatas, plates and more from Leonardo, Raphael, Michelangelo and Donatello. Perfect for action-packed birthday parties with lots of pizza - fun is guaranteed!
